## Checklist

- [ ] I kept generated `.sgrx/` state, credentials, private repository content,
      and machine-specific paths out of this change.
- [ ] I treated researched source as untrusted data and did not execute it.
- [ ] I added or updated deterministic tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-visible changes.
- [ ] I ran the relevant checks from `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
